findings.title: opea-project/GenAIEval
findings.description: Evaluation, benchmark, and scorecard, targeting for performance on throughput and latency, accuracy on popular evaluation harness, safety, and hallucination

findings.title: The-AI-Alliance/trust-safety-evals
findings.description: The AI Alliance project to define a reference stack for AI model and system evaluation, with evaluations, benchmarks, and leaderboards.

findings.title: Giskard-AI/phare
findings.description: Phare is a LLM benchmark that evaluates models across key AI security & safety dimensions

findings.title: Beijing-AISI/ForesightSafety-Bench
findings.description: ForesightSafety Bench: a comprehensive, systematic, and forward-looking AI safety evaluation benchmark that encompasses three hierarchical levels, 22 pillars, and 94 granular risk dimensions.

findings.title: sebuzdugan/frai-benchmark
findings.description: FRAI Benchmark: Future Responsible AI Evaluation A consensus-based safety and compliance benchmark for SOTA LLMs (DeepSeek, Grok, GPT-5). Uses a "Panel of Experts" methodology where multiple frontier models judge response quality to ensure non-biased, high-fidelity safety scores

findings.title: kelkalot/ai-secbench
findings.description: Security-focused AI reasoning benchmark for evaluating cipher analysis, steganography detection, and adversarial robustness

findings.title: superU-ai/voice-agent-QA
findings.description: A unified benchmarking framework for evaluating Voice AI agents across conversational quality, audio realism, latency metrics, and safety guardrails with scalable multi-language stress testing.

findings.title: chenglin1112/AgentTrust
findings.description: Real-time trustworthiness evaluation and safety interception for AI agents. Semantic analysis, safe alternative suggestions, multi-step attack chain detection, and LLM-as-Judge.

findings.title: nagu-io/agent-settlement-bench
findings.description: Benchmark for evaluating safety of AI agents in irreversible financial decisions (crypto payment settlement, consensus conflicts, replay attacks, finality races).

findings.title: givecareapp/givecare-bench
findings.description: AI safety benchmark for long-term caregiving relationships. Tests crisis detection, regulatory   compliance, and care quality across multi-turn conversations. Includes GiveCare system paper and InvisibleBench evaluation framework.

findings.title: THUZeng/embodied-eval-kit
findings.description: Open-source embodied AI eval gate: validate logs -> compare runs -> GO/NO-GO decision -> audit/tender-ready delivery bundle + offline portal.

findings.title: Max-Highsmith/safety-dance
findings.description: A standard protocol for AI safety benchmarks to declare requirements and AI models to declare capabilities, enabling compatibility handshakes before evaluation.

findings.title: gsavla6-hue/ai-agent-evaluation-framework
findings.description: Comprehensive evaluation framework for AI agents measuring task completion, tool use accuracy, reasoning quality, safety and cost efficiency with benchmarking

findings.title: AishwaryaVathada/comp-ref-benchmark-build
findings.description: Multimodal AI safety benchmark pipeline using comp-ref methodology - includes image generation, automated captioning, benchmark construction, and model evaluation frameworks.

findings.title: bdas-sec/ptf-id-bench
findings.description: Progressive Trust Framework: AI Agent Safety Evaluation Benchmark with 280 scenarios testing Intelligent Disobedience

findings.title: Garyxue213/c-rex-benchmark
findings.description: C-REX Benchmark - AI Safety Research Framework for    evaluating emergent collaborative deception in multi-agent LLM systems

findings.title: reiidoda/OpenRe
findings.description: Open-source AI agent evaluation workbench for benchmarking, tracing, optimization, and safety with human approval.

findings.title: patelpa1639/agenteval
findings.description: AI agent evaluation framework — benchmark coding agents with multi-dimensional scoring (correctness, efficiency, safety, recovery)

findings.title: mmbeamsplitter/agent-bench
findings.description: AI Agent Benchmarking and Testing Framework - Evaluate capability, safety, reliability, and performance

findings.title: natnew/Awesome-AI-Safety-for-Agentic-Systems
findings.description: A curated, technically rigorous list of tools, frameworks, papers, benchmarks, patterns, and resources for building, evaluating, and securing agentic AI systems in real-world environments.
